mapper.select:
SELECT ou.id, ou.account, ou.realname, ou.identify, ou.phone,
ou.address, ou.gender, ou.email, ou.description, ou.state, ou.create_by, ou.create_time, ou.update_by, ou.update_time, ou.sort,
LISTAGG(DISTINCT orr.name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY orr.name) AS roleNames
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT orr.name SEPARATOR ',') AS roleNames
FROM org_user ou LEFT JOIN org_user_department oud ON ou.id = oud.user_id LEFT JOIN org_department od ON oud.department_id = od.id AND od.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN org_role orr ON oud.role_id = orr.id AND orr.is_deleted = 0
ou.is_deleted = 0 AND ou.state != '9'
AND (ou.realname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR ou.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR ou.account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR orr.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%'))
AND od.dept_code LIKE CONCAT(#{param.deptCode}, '%')
GROUP BY ou.id, ou.account, ou.realname, ou.identify, ou.phone, ou.address, ou.gender, ou.email, ou.description, ou.state, ou.create_by, ou.create_time, ou.update_by, ou.update_time, ou.sort ORDER BY ou.sort, ou.create_time DESC

SELECT ou.id, ou.account, ou.realname, ou.identify, ou.phone,
ou.address, ou.gender, ou.email, ou.description, ou.state as stateEnum, ou.create_by, ou.create_time, ou.update_by, ou.update_time, ou.sort, od.dept_name, sr.region_name,
LISTAGG(DISTINCT orr.name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY orr.name) AS roleNames
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT orr.name SEPARATOR ',') AS roleNames
FROM org_user ou LEFT JOIN org_user_department oud ON ou.id = oud.user_id LEFT JOIN org_department od ON oud.department_id = od.id AND od.is_deleted = 0
LEFT JOIN org_role orr ON oud.role_id = orr.id AND orr.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_region sr ON od.region_code = sr.region_code
ou.is_deleted = 0 AND ou.state != '9'
AND (ou.realname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR ou.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR ou.account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%') OR orr.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{param.keyword}, '%'))
AND od.dept_code LIKE CONCAT(#{param.deptCode}, '%')
GROUP BY ou.id, ou.account, ou.realname, ou.identify, ou.phone, ou.address, ou.gender, ou.email, ou.description, ou.state, ou.create_by, ou.create_time, ou.update_by, ou.update_time, ou.sort ORDER BY ou.sort, ou.create_time DESC

SELECT ou.id, ou.account, ou.realname, ou.identify, ou.phone, ou.address, ou.gender, ou.email, ou.description, ou.state, ou.create_by, ou.create_time, ou.update_by, ou.update_time, ou.sort,
LISTAGG(DISTINCT orr.name, ',') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY orr.name) AS roleNames
GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT orr.name SEPARATOR ',') AS roleNames
FROM org_user ou LEFT JOIN org_user_department oud ON ou.id = oud.user_id LEFT JOIN org_department od ON oud.department_id = od.id AND od.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN org_role orr ON oud.role_id = orr.id AND orr.is_deleted = 0
ou.is_deleted = 0 AND ou.state != '9'
AND od.id in
#{deptId}
GROUP BY ou.id, ou.account, ou.realname, ou.identify, ou.phone, ou.address, ou.gender, ou.email, ou.description, ou.state, ou.create_by, ou.create_time, ou.update_by, ou.update_time, ou.sort ORDER BY ou.sort, ou.create_time DESC
